title: GKB Opticals is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: GKB Opticals is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a E-commerce Executive in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
